name: org.machanism.machai:bindex-maven-plugin
description:
bindex-maven-plugin is a Maven plugin (packaging: maven-plugin) that integrates the Machai/Bindex indexing workflow into a Maven build to generate, update, clean, and register Bindex metadata for Maven projects. It enables automated generation and registration of bindex metadata used for library discovery, integration, and application assembly, leveraging structured metadata and GenAI-powered semantic search within the Machanism ecosystem.

Core goals (Mojos):
- create: creates a new Bindex index and related resources for the current module; skips modules with pom packaging.
- update: incrementally refreshes an existing Bindex index; skips pom packaging.
- register: scans the project folder and publishes Bindex metadata to an external registry endpoint (bindex.register.url, default from org.machanism.machai.bindex.BindexRepository.DB_URL); can optionally update while registering (update parameter, default true); skips pom packaging.
- clean: removes temporary artifacts generated by Machai/Bindex tooling, currently deleting .machai/bindex-inputs.txt under the project base directory.

Configuration and credentials:
- bindex.model (required): AI provider/model identifier used by BindexCreator/BindexRegister (e.g., OpenAI:gpt-5).
- gw.genai.serverId (optional): Maven settings.xml <server> id used to resolve GenAI credentials; if set, GENAI_USERNAME and GENAI_PASSWORD are read from the matching <server> username/password and injected into a workflow PropertiesConfigurator.

Implementation overview:
- Common behavior is implemented in org.machanism.machai.bindex.maven.AbstractBindexMojo: it prepares a PropertiesConfigurator, constructs a BindexCreator with the selected model, configures update mode and optional input logging (ApplicationAssembly.LOG_INPUTS_PROP_NAME), builds a MavenProjectLayout (basedir + Maven model), and processes the module folder to generate index/resources.
- Create/Update/Register always log GenAI usage via org.machanism.machai.ai.manager.GenAIProviderManager.logUsage() in finally blocks.

Typical usage:
- mvn org.machanism.machai:bindex-maven-plugin:create -Dbindex.model=OpenAI:gpt-5
- mvn org.machanism.machai:bindex-maven-plugin:update -Dbindex.model=OpenAI:gpt-5
- mvn org.machanism.machai:bindex-maven-plugin:register -Dbindex.model=OpenAI:gpt-5 -Dbindex.register.url=http://localhost:8080
- mvn org.machanism.machai:bindex-maven-plugin:clean

Dependencies and ecosystem context:
- Built on Machai Bindex core (org.machanism.machai:bindex-core) and Maven plugin APIs; uses SLF4J for logging. Intended for Java/Maven projects in the Machanism ecosystem that want to produce and publish machine-consumable metadata for semantic search and automated assembly.

usageContext: CI/CD pipelines for metadata generation and publishing

constructors.description: Creates a BindexCreator used by the plugin goals to generate or update the Bindex index and related resources for a Maven module. The creator is configured with the GenAI provider/model identifier and workflow properties (including optional credentials from Maven settings.xml).

examples.description: Creates a BindexCreator with a specific model id and selects create mode.

constructors.description: Creates a BindexRegister used by the register goal to scan a project folder and publish Bindex metadata to an external registry endpoint. The instance can be configured to update metadata during registration.

examples.description: Creates a register client pointing to a registry URL and enables update mode.

features.name: create (Mojo goal)
features.description: Creates a new Bindex index and related resources for the current Maven module. The goal is executed in the INSTALL phase and is skipped for modules with packaging "pom". Uses the configured bindex.model and shared AbstractBindexMojo logic to process the module folder and generate metadata.

examples.description: Runs the create goal for the current module using the selected AI provider/model.

features.name: update (Mojo goal)
features.description: Updates (refreshes) an existing Bindex index for the current Maven module. The goal is executed in the INSTALL phase and is skipped for modules with packaging "pom". Internally invokes the shared createBindex(true) logic to run in incremental update mode.

examples.description: Runs the update goal to refresh Bindex metadata for the current module.

features.name: register (Mojo goal)
features.description: Scans the project folder and publishes Bindex metadata to an external registry endpoint. The goal is executed in the INSTALL phase and is skipped for modules with packaging "pom". Controlled by bindex.register.url (registry endpoint URL) and update (boolean, default true).

examples.description: Registers generated/scanned Bindex metadata to a local registry service.

features.name: clean (Mojo goal)
features.description: Deletes temporary artifacts created by Machai/Bindex tooling for the project. Currently removes the inputs log file at .machai/bindex-inputs.txt under the module base directory. Bound to Maven CLEAN phase.

features.name: Maven settings-based GenAI credential resolution
features.description: Builds a PropertiesConfigurator for Bindex workflows. If gw.genai.serverId is provided, reads the corresponding <server> entry from Maven settings.xml and injects GENAI_USERNAME and GENAI_PASSWORD when present. Fails with MojoExecutionException if settings are unavailable or the server id cannot be found.

examples.description: Configures credentials in Maven settings.xml and instructs the plugin to load them via gw.genai.serverId.
Generate Bindex metadata for the current module during a build.
Publish Bindex metadata for the current module to an external registry endpoint.
